posts.title: What Chapter One Could Feel Like
posts.excerpt: Picnics, bike rides, live music, card games, short films and exploring somewhere new: the first version is being shaped by Trendies.

posts.title: Why the Flag Wall Matters
posts.excerpt: Every flag is a signal that someone, somewhere, wants to make new friends and expand their circle in real life.

posts.title: A Note on Safe Public Plans
posts.excerpt: Chapter One starts with daylight, public places, clear plans and the option to bring a friend or arrive alone.
